title: phacelia heterophylla f. frigida
intro: Phacelia heterophylla f. frigida is a subspecies of the Phacelia heterophylla plant, known for its unique and varied foliage. As an herb, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phacelia heterophylla f. frigida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. Phacelia heterophylla f. frigida can be used in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in the production of essential oils.
